connections.when: Charts populate dashboard panels; visualization is the atomic unit of dashboards
connections.yields: dashboard-design visualization patterns and chart panel content

connections.when: Visualization consumes analysis insights and renders them as charts
connections.yields: data-analysis findings rendered as visual encodings

connections.when: Visualization provides the visual evidence that storytelling weaves into narrative
connections.yields: data-storytelling visual evidence for narrative construction

connections.when: Chart type knowledge from visualization aids decoding in interpretation
connections.yields: chart-interpretation type recognition and decoding context

connections.when: Graphic design provides color theory and typography foundations for chart design
Slide design shares visual hierarchy and decluttering principles
Data visualization provides visual evidence for executive narratives
